overview: Asmo Food is a quadrabonus tempo deck in Modern that leverages cheap persist creatures and Asmoranomardicadaistinaculdacar to generate relentless board presence. Archon of Cruelty provides critical life total manipulation and value generation upon death. The deck aims to outlast opponents through recursive value and aggressive pressure across W/B/R/G mana bases.
win_conditions: Overwhelming board presence with recurried persist creatures
Life total manipulation and drain via Archon of Cruelty

keep_criteria: Hands with early persist creatures or Archon of Cruelty
Hands containing Asmoranomardicadaistinaculdacar with cheap recursion targets
Mana bases supporting W/B/R/G early turns
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early board presence or recursion targets
Hands with only high-cost cards and no persist creatures
Mana screws in the quadrabonus color scheme

early_game: Deploy cheap persist creatures to establish early board presence
Prioritize mana development to support W/B/R/G casting costs
Hold up mana to protect key threats from early removal
mid_game: Cast Asmoranomardicadaistinaculdacar to begin recurring persist creatures
Use Archon of Cruelty to swing life totals and generate value
Maintain board pressure while filtering draw step for recursion targets
late_game: Chain persist returns to create unblockable or massive board states
Leverage Archon of Cruelty deaths to drain opponent life totals
Close out games with Asmo's trample damage or life total manipulation

key_cards.name: Asmoranomardicadaistinaculdacar
key_cards.role: Primary recursion engine and aggressive threat
key_cards.notes: Hold up red mana to activate or protect, then trigger death effect to return target 2-mana or less creatures like persist enablers.

key_cards.name: Archon of Cruelty
key_cards.role: Life total manipulation and value generator
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice or let it die to swing life totals by 6, then recur it with Asmo for repeated value.

key_cards.name: Persist
key_cards.role: Recursive creature mechanic enabling infinite value loops
key_cards.notes: Play creatures with this ability to return from graveyard with a -1/-1 counter, then recur them again with Asmo for board presence.

sequencing_tips: Hold up red mana before Asmo dies to ensure it can be cast or protected
Time Archon of Cruelty deaths to maximize life swing before opponent's turn
Prioritize returning persist creatures with Asmo to maintain board pressure
Use W/B/R/G mana efficiently to cast recursion targets before graveyard hate

matchups.advice: Use persist creatures to outvalue early aggression and hold up removal for key threats
Race with Asmo's trample and use Archon of Cruelty to survive board wipes
Trade efficiently and recur key threats to overwhelm their resource advantage
